utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear with corresponding entries. Check full specification: Each requires the type plus costs. Health coverage includes plan name and monthly/annual costs (meets requirement of physical and mental with costs, implicitly covered by plan name). Property coverage includes plan name and monthly/annual costs (home/contents with costs). Travel coverage includes plan name and monthly/annual costs. Additional services lists services with individual costs and total monthly/annual cost. Total budget provides monthly and annual totals. All items are present and include costs; the format expectations are satisfied.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: EliteCare Premium (Physical + Mental) for health, EliteHome Premium Coverage for property, EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel, and two additional services: Home Office Protection and Technology Protection. From the ground-truth ratings: EliteCare Premium Plan (health, physical) has rating 2 and EliteCare Premium Plan (mental) has rating 2; however, the plan name 'EliteCare Premium (Physical + Mental)' corresponds to EliteCare Premium Plan entries which both carry rating 2, so overall this selection maps to the EliteCare Premium Plan rating of 2. EliteHome Premium Coverage has a rating of 2. EliteTravel Premium Plan has a rating of 2. Technology Protection has a rating of 8. Home Office Protection has a rating of 7.
